data.body: Bash-suite split DECISION (final AC item): DEFER the flat split of test-ticket-lib/transition/link/create/list.sh — do NOT split them now. Rationale: the adult-oxide-slave bash->Python strangler-fig migration replaces these bash suites with pytest wholesale; splitting them first would be throwaway churn (carving bash we plan to delete, against the module-size policy's 'prefer deleting oversized bash over carving it'). The two Python monoliths (reducer 3647 LOC, graph 2792 LOC) are already split along seams, count-neutral and green. Bash split folded into the strangler-fig epic. All AC items resolved.
